gluten_free: Drink inspired by “alcohol-free whisky”! And gluten-free! Whissin is one of our most famous alcohol-free appetizers, winner in 1998 of the most innovative product in SIAL. A product specially designed for all those lovers of “classic distillates” who wish to enjoy all flavours but with 0.0% alcohol. A must in the collection that will take your glass to another level. Pour yourself a classic drink “on the rocks”, mixed with other usual drinks, or simply in a glass, you choose your favourite style!

Discover Frutaysol Herbs! Enjoy one of our most popular appetizers inspired by non-alcoholic herb liqueur, a refreshing drink ideal for drinking before or after meals, with ice or in a short cold glass. The perfect option for those who don’t want to drink after meals or simply for those who want to enjoy an incredible taste with a fresh drink without alcohol or gas, a product with a very low amount of calories and sugar! Buy now and discover some spectacular tasting shots! Available in an elegant 70cl bottle. 6 flavours available! Take a look.

All the flavor of a vermouth, refreshing and gluten-free! Versin is one of our signature “free-from” drinks, specially designed for all lovers of this type of aperitif. Prepare a glass with ice, pour a portion of Versin, and enjoy the intense flavor of our vermouth-inspired drink. Prepare a glass with ice, pour a portion of Versin and enjoy the intense flavour of this famous alcohol-free drink.

Dama de Baza Strawberry Syrup. Let yourself be surprised by our line of syrups and concentrates with the best selected fruits, top quality chosen by more than one million consumers. An ideal resource to dilute and prepare all kinds of mixtures “with” or “without” alcohol: Cocktails Shots Drinks Slushies and milkshakes And much more! Never before have you found so much variety of colour in a concentrate! Enjoy this and 15 other flavours available in our catalogue. And if you like the taste of banana, we recommend you take a look at our delicious fruit concentrates.
